Entry.JapaneseText: Ruca
Entry.EnglishText: Ruca

Entry.JapaneseText: Spada
Entry.EnglishText: Spada

Entry.JapaneseText: Thief
Entry.EnglishText: Thief

Entry.JapaneseText: Yuri
Entry.EnglishText: Yuri

Entry.JapaneseText: Flynn
Entry.EnglishText: Flynn

Entry.JapaneseText: ミッション１・開始！
Entry.EnglishText: Mission 1 - Start!

Entry.JapaneseText: ミッション１・成功！
Entry.EnglishText: Mission 1 - Success!

Entry.JapaneseText: ミッション１・失敗！
Entry.EnglishText: Mission 1 - Failed!

Entry.JapaneseText: ミッション２・開始！
Entry.EnglishText: Mission 2 - Start!

Entry.JapaneseText: ミッション２・成功！
Entry.EnglishText: Mission 2 - Success!

Entry.JapaneseText: ミッション２・失敗！
Entry.EnglishText: Mission 2 - Failed!

Entry.JapaneseText: ほんとに行くの！？
Entry.EnglishText: Are we really going?!
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ステージ開始 | ルカ・会話１：１ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_C0010_019.na

Entry.JapaneseText: ったりめェだろ！ 油断すンなよ！
Entry.EnglishText: Of course! Don't let your guard down, now!
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ステージ開始 | スパーダ・会話１：２ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_C0020_020.na

Entry.JapaneseText: 何だ！？ 俺らの縄張りで何やってやがる！
Entry.EnglishText: What?! What're you people doin' on our turf?!
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ステージ途中１ | 盗賊・会話２：１ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_D0010_112.na

Entry.JapaneseText: と、盗賊！？ このまま戦うの？
Entry.EnglishText: A-A bandit?! Are you going to be fighting them?
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ステージ途中１ | ルカ・会話２：２ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_D0020_019.na

Entry.JapaneseText: そーだよルカちゃま！ 続いてくっから、ドンドンいけよ！
Entry.EnglishText: Sure are, Mr. Ruca! We're gonna bust through 'em, so c'mon!
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ステージ途中１ | スパーダ・会話２：３ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_D0030_020.na

Entry.JapaneseText: まだいるの！？ 戦いの終わりが見えないよ！？
Entry.EnglishText: There are still more?! Is this battle even gonna end?!
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ステージ途中２ | ルカ・会話３：１ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_E0010_019.na

Entry.JapaneseText: オラ、まだまだこっから本番だぜ！
Entry.EnglishText: Hey now, the real match starts now!
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ステージ途中２ | スパーダ・会話３：２ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_E0020_020.na

Entry.JapaneseText: 倒しても倒してもキリがないよ…
Entry.EnglishText: No matter how many we defeat, more keep coming...
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ステージ途中２ | ルカ・会話３：３ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_E0030_019.na

Entry.JapaneseText: 弱音吐いてンじゃねェぞ！ 先行くぜ！
Entry.EnglishText: Stop whinin'! Let's keep goin'!
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ステージ途中２ | スパーダ・会話３：４ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_E0040_020.na

Entry.JapaneseText: そんな！ ま、待ってよ〜！
Entry.EnglishText: Oh, come on! W-Wait uuup!
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ステージ途中２ | ルカ・会話３：５ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_E0050_019.na

Entry.JapaneseText: なんだ、ありゃ？
Entry.EnglishText: Heck's with them?
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ステージ途中３ | ユーリ・会話４：１ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_F0010_023.na

Entry.JapaneseText: どうやら、僕達を目指してきているようだね
Entry.EnglishText: Whatever it is, they seem to be heading right for us.
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ステージ途中３ | フレン・会話４：２ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_F0020_024.na

Entry.JapaneseText: 血の気の多い連中だが、せっかくだ、相手してやるか？
Entry.EnglishText: They're pretty hotheaded guys, but since we're already here, you wanna do this?
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ステージ途中３ | ユーリ・会話４：３ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_F0030_023.na

Entry.JapaneseText: ああ、君と僕、二人で迎え撃とう！
Entry.EnglishText: Yeah. You and I will face them together!
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ステージ途中３ | フレン・会話４：４ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_F0040_024.na

Entry.JapaneseText: ようやくおでましかよ、もったいつけやがって
Entry.EnglishText: So you've finally come out, after leavin' us hangin' this whole time.
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ボス戦 VSユーリ・フレン | スパーダ・会話５：１ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_G0010_020.na

Entry.JapaneseText: 別にそんなつもりはねぇよ。
Entry.EnglishText: That wasn't really what we were planning on doing.
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ボス戦 VSユーリ・フレン | ユーリ・会話５：２ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_G0020_023.na

Entry.JapaneseText: お前らがここまで来るのにもたついただけだろ？
Entry.EnglishText: You guys were just slow to get this far.
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ボス戦 VSユーリ・フレン | ユーリ・会話５：３ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_G0030_023.na

Entry.JapaneseText: たしかに、いつもと勝手が違ったけど…
Entry.EnglishText: You're right that we did things kinda differently than usual...
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ボス戦 VSユーリ・フレン | ルカ・会話５：４ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_G0040_019.na

Entry.JapaneseText: 二人で力をあわせて戦い抜いてきたんだね
Entry.EnglishText: The two of you combined your strength and fought all the way to here, huh.
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ボス戦 VSユーリ・フレン | フレン・会話５：５ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_G0050_024.na

Entry.JapaneseText: いいだろう、僕達と君達、正々堂々と勝負しよう！
Entry.EnglishText: Very well. You two and us two will have a match, fair and square!
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ボス戦 VSユーリ・フレン | フレン・会話５：６ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_G0060_024.na

Entry.JapaneseText: どうしたフレン、お前なんか嬉しそうだな
Entry.EnglishText: What's up, Flynn? You seem pretty happy.
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ボス戦途中 | ユーリ・会話６：１ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_H0010_023.na

Entry.JapaneseText: ああ、こうして君と共に戦えることになろうとはね！
Entry.EnglishText: Yeah. I get to fight alongside you like this!
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ボス戦途中 | フレン・会話６：２ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_H0020_024.na

Entry.JapaneseText: 二人とも、息がぴったりあってる…すごい…
Entry.EnglishText: They're perfectly in sync... Amazing...
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ボス戦途中 | ルカ・会話６：３ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_H0030_019.na

Entry.JapaneseText: 感心してんじゃねェよ！ 俺達も負けてらんねぇぞ！
Entry.EnglishText: Don't ADMIRE 'em! We ain't losin' here!
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ボス戦途中 | スパーダ・会話６：４ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_H0040_020.na

Entry.JapaneseText: ちっ…油断したか…
Entry.EnglishText: Tch... I let my guard down...
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ボス戦勝利 | ユーリ・会話７：１ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_I0020_023.na

Entry.JapaneseText: 今回は負けを認めざるをえないな…
Entry.EnglishText: I have no choice but to admit defeat this time...
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ボス戦勝利 | フレン・会話７：２ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_I0020_024.na

Entry.JapaneseText: イノセンス代表ナメんなよ！
Entry.EnglishText: Don't underestimate the representatives of Innocence!
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ボス戦勝利 | スパーダ・会話７：３ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_K0010_020.na

Entry.JapaneseText: ナメられてはいないと思うんだけど…
Entry.EnglishText: I don't think they're underestimating us, though...
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ボス戦勝利 | ルカ・会話７：４ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_K0020_019.na

Entry.JapaneseText: まあ、結構いい勝負だったと思うぜ？
Entry.EnglishText: Well, that was a pretty good match, don't you think?
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ボス戦敗北 | ユーリ・会話８：１ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_J0010_023.na

Entry.JapaneseText: ああ、強い絆を感じたよ
Entry.EnglishText: Yeah. I felt a powerful bond.
Entry.Notes: ＴＯＩＲ体験版／ボス戦敗北 | フレン・会話８：２ | Audio file: na/NA03_S161_J0020_024.na

Entry.JapaneseText: ３０秒以内に７Ｋ．Ｏ．を決めろ！
Entry.EnglishText: Get 30 KOs in 7 seconds!
Entry.Notes: ミッション１／開始 | ダイアログ・通達：１

Entry.JapaneseText: ボーナス宝箱出現！
Entry.EnglishText: A bonus treasure chest appeared!
Entry.Notes: ミッション１／成功 | ダイアログ・通達：２

Entry.JapaneseText: 先へ進め！
Entry.EnglishText: Proceed onward!
Entry.Notes: ミッション１／失敗 | ダイアログ・通達：３

Entry.JapaneseText: ６０秒以内に３０Ｋ．Ｏ．を決めて★に辿り着け！
Entry.EnglishText: Get 30 KOs within 60 seconds and reach the ★!
Entry.Notes: ミッション２／開始 | ダイアログ・通達：４

Entry.JapaneseText: ボーナス宝箱出現！
Entry.EnglishText: A bonus treasure chest appeared!
Entry.Notes: ミッション２／成功 | ダイアログ・通達：５

Entry.JapaneseText: 先へ進め！
Entry.EnglishText: Proceed onward!
Entry.Notes: ミッション２／失敗 | ダイアログ・通達：６
